description: Contract governing the handoff of finalized write records from the Write Dispatch Agent to the Vault for permanent storage.

atom_id.description: ID of the semantic atom this vault record originates from.

source_intent_id.description: ID of the originating IDE intent, carried forward through the full pipeline.

content.description: Final content string to be stored in the Vault.

destination.description: Target storage destination within the Vault system.

write_mode.description: Write strategy. APPEND adds to existing records; OVERWRITE replaces the current record for this atom_id.

vault_tag.description: Semantic tag applied to this vault record for retrieval and indexing.

drift_score.description: Semantic drift score from CCE, propagated to vault for audit.

veil_level.description: Epistemic veil level from CFC, propagated to vault for audit.

paig_score.description: PAM principle alignment score, propagated to vault for audit.

invariant_check.description: Stumpy invariant results from EGG, stored verbatim in vault metadata.

generation_mode.description: EGG generation mode, carried forward for vault indexing.

pam_flagged.description: True if PAM flagged the originating atom. Stored for audit trail.

invariant_failures.description: List of failing Stumpy invariant keys, present if EGG_WDA INVARIANT_FAILURE was flagged.

low_confidence.description: True if EGG_WDA LOW_CONFIDENCE flag was raised.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of WDA write dispatch.

guarantees: atom_id references a valid semantic atom that passed EGG_WDA contract.
source_intent_id references a valid IDE intent that initiated the pipeline.
destination is one of the defined enum values.
metadata contains all required pipeline audit fields.
metadata.invariant_check mirrors the invariant_check from EGG.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

EMPTY_CONTENT.description: content is empty or whitespace only.
EMPTY_CONTENT.escalation: Log and emit WDA_ERROR event. Do not write to Vault.

INVALID_DESTINATION.description: destination is not one of the defined enum values.
INVALID_DESTINATION.escalation: Log and emit WDA_ERROR event. Do not write to Vault.

MISSING_METADATA.description: metadata object is absent or missing required audit fields.
MISSING_METADATA.escalation: Log and emit WDA_ERROR event. Do not write to Vault.

OVERWRITE_WITHOUT_EXISTING_RECORD.description: write_mode=OVERWRITE but no record exists for this atom_id in the target destination.
OVERWRITE_WITHOUT_EXISTING_RECORD.escalation: Downgrade to APPEND and log WDA_WARN event. Proceed with write.

INVARIANT_FAILURES_UNRECORDED.description: EGG_WDA INVARIANT_FAILURE was flagged but metadata.invariant_failures is absent.
INVARIANT_FAILURES_UNRECORDED.escalation: Log and emit WDA_ERROR event. Do not write to Vault. Invariant failures must be recorded for audit integrity.
